_readme:
This file contains TWO n8n workflows. In n8n, create two new workflows and import the JSON under each top-level key separately (copy the value of `workflowA_finalSubmit` into the first workflow, `workflowB_draftEmail` into the second). After importing, bind credentials, activate each workflow, copy the production webhook URL from the Webhook node, and paste it into the appropriate config (see README.md).

Workflow A does two things on submit: (1) saves the markdown to a Google Drive folder as a .md file, (2) emails Shayne with a link to the saved file plus the full markdown inline.
